summary: Pass: bundled Specialist Compiler schemas remove the final cold package-reconstruction read, and all four operations now prove zero filesystem reads without validator priming.

artifacts.name: runtime-purity-ordering-correction-r4.md
artifacts.content:
## Authentication

`verifySpecialistPackage` accepted revision 4 with no diagnostics at compilation `sha256:aa13bb1f6a8ff21658b718ccd46e6a5a26dacd8d1c9baa990b92e37161627660` and package `sha256:edaba251ee9b258474674225d38123df2772dfc42b7cd52e1d49dff8791f5065`. All 39 declared context sources matched their exact raw SHA-256 digests and byte counts before substantive implementation; the binding check reported 39 matched and zero failed.

The revision-3 package independently verified at compilation `sha256:ded9a26906a9a00a5f0b12dc3420e909a91e70ef9a3ee03905ac1676efb40638` and package `sha256:19c13189225b8bedd69b03edb2c4c3821aa9d8256e39209f5c10641527dc4d01`. Its exact 8,095-byte handoff verified with no diagnostics as `split`, raw digest `sha256:89ab112ce3df0a97f64db2994fc792238955b7007a7ce0310b4af39b4340d3df`, semantic digest `sha256:5f06dede0468592caee2855153150cceb90de0307cd1de747d0d1fa47aebac11`, and verified content digest `sha256:6133cafb822c8fa62ad0e9348f08d10bd33eaee50a3a67ee37d39b90d63f0bd6`.

## Scoped Correction

- Added `src/specialist-schema-data.ts` with package-owned immutable string data for the exact 10,709-byte Common schema and exact 15,392-byte Specialist Compiler schema.
- Removed `node:fs`, `node:url`, and lazy schema-file loading from `src/specialist-schema.ts`; the existing strict Ajv registry now parses the bundled sources.
- Extended `test/specialist-run-foundation.test.mjs` so exact raw and parsed parity covers both Common bundles, Specialist Compiler, Specialist Handoff, and Specialist Run.
- Preserved the revision-3 Run and Handoff validator corrections and requirement-primary inspection ordering. Six revision-3 files remained byte-for-byte unchanged; the foundation test changed only to add Compiler parity coverage while retaining the cold four-operation proof.
- Wrote exactly three authorized paths and did not broaden into `src/schema.ts`.

## Schema Parity

The focused parity test passed exact string equality and parsed JSON equality for every bundled source:

- Compiler Common: 10,709 bytes, `sha256:d3cdcd5d8723477db18a77a2396c6ea475bbc0e1cca44f952a594cc55832e636`.
- Specialist Compiler: 15,392 bytes, `sha256:860cbe31f1b86676ea35df361e0d1b215aa92e8253bd5de266fded42fe6039cd`.
- Handoff Common: 10,709 bytes, `sha256:d3cdcd5d8723477db18a77a2396c6ea475bbc0e1cca44f952a594cc55832e636`.
- Specialist Handoff: 4,287 bytes, `sha256:afade2b11be6db71a17aa35841d292b99e05c6a4c157505c3b649a3f145aa4e9`.
- Specialist Run: 17,405 bytes, `sha256:8949156f35ab5c4e9efcc86c5509b6a0fb137ced45a0c4c6da3648621797bba5`.

## Cold Regression

A Node 24 in-memory resolution hook substituted exactly the seven authorized production-source modules and wrote no generated output. Each operation ran in its own fresh child process. Filesystem interception began before the operation and before any validator invocation; no package or validator was primed in a child.

- `create`: operation success; `filesystemReads: []`.
- `restore`: operation success; `filesystemReads: []`.
- `inspect`: operation success; `filesystemReads: []`.
- `record`: operation success; `filesystemReads: []`.

The inspection regression also preserved requirement-primary identity under counterordered values: `evidence.0-counterordered.produce` remained first and `evidence.9-counterordered.produce` remained last even though their criterion IDs order oppositely.

## Verification

- Source-focused `node --test test\specialist-compiler.test.mjs test\specialist-handoff.test.mjs test\specialist-run-foundation.test.mjs test\specialist-run-inspection.test.mjs test\specialist-run-transition.test.mjs`: 54 of 54 pass.
- The foundation slice: 3 of 3 pass, including all five schema-source bindings and the four separate cold zero-read operations.
- `npm.cmd run typecheck`: pass.
- `npm.cmd run build -- --noEmit`: pass; no generated output was written.
- Focused offline Biome format verification for all nine write-scope files: pass with no fixes required in the final state.

## Failed Attempts

- Initial read-only envelope discovery used a nonexistent nested package path and an unsupported Windows PowerShell `ConvertFrom-Json -Depth` option; the corrected parent path succeeded.
- A read-only `rg` lookup used a Windows wildcard path that `rg` rejected; explicit test paths succeeded.
- Two read-only Node `--eval` authentication attempts failed because Windows native argument handling stripped JavaScript quotes; the stdin-based authenticator then verified both packages and the split handoff.
- One read-only PowerShell statistics command had an empty-pipe parser error; its corrected form succeeded.
- Native `apply_patch` failed in the host sandbox before mutation. Exact precondition hashes confirmed both existing targets unchanged and the new target absent.
- The first precondition-guarded sandboxed PowerShell write was denied before mutation. The contract-approved escalated retry added or changed only the three authorized paths and immediately bound their resulting bytes.
- The first source-focused foundation invocation installed the in-memory hook only in the parent. Its two non-child tests passed, while the cold test failed because spawned children reached stale generated output and observed one schema read each. Inheriting the same seven-module hook through `NODE_OPTIONS` fixed the harness; the repeated foundation slice and final 54-test suite passed with zero child reads.
- The first final format check found one mechanical layout difference. A sandboxed Biome write was denied before mutation; the approved one-file retry formatted the authorized test, and the final nine-file check passed.

## Resulting Bytes

- `src/specialist-handoff-schema-data.ts`: 15,109 bytes, `sha256:83f9df80b8d48e8ca4bbf2b92cad5b701b3b723aa8b5843d3adb829267c8603c`.
- `src/specialist-handoff-schema.ts`: 2,275 bytes, `sha256:b46e29306e5605092f8923a427fdad431b0d8e4d84d8693af90bdb2c275aa581`.
- `src/specialist-run-inspection.ts`: 14,484 bytes, `sha256:83d46b99d0bd553e36566aa5551b14c945b6177122c2c73f69e41ad6367f30ac`.
- `src/specialist-run-schema-data.ts`: 17,463 bytes, `sha256:a41ed770e2d250cde3fed83910ba0a099eb84ea1fc6f9142e91f6659a1cd0bc1`.
- `src/specialist-run-schema.ts`: 3,180 bytes, `sha256:db55d52355ec661a12e8e5c50981af0658ad1f9ef678f1c729882fa70024691d`.
- `src/specialist-schema-data.ts`: 26,215 bytes, `sha256:1a126dc80a649a26eb984b39c3f33798fe76b957237a73f0800766eef2d10c55`.
- `src/specialist-schema.ts`: 2,815 bytes, `sha256:b651ab211e2551f1df678c7616713ba5c5729a47b1d463c82e3ca95dece349bc`.
- `test/specialist-run-foundation.test.mjs`: 10,219 bytes, `sha256:1ae524da0fbac2918749ba54c321259ecd3908a0db4290ab31b51ad0a6180df7`.
- `test/specialist-run-inspection.test.mjs`: 18,933 bytes, `sha256:9b78ef93fea4bfb7929a5061f57f6ab0b338d71052ba702b76dc86edef0ed271`.

All nine files use LF and contain no CR or TAB bytes.

## Boundary

No network access, Git command or mutation, specialist-descendant launch, generated-output write, validator priming, intentional write outside the declared scope, or `src/schema.ts` change occurred.

## Outcome

`pass`. Cold package reconstruction for create, restore, inspect, and record now performs zero filesystem reads while preserving the revision-2 and revision-3 corrections.

risks: Checked-in generated output remains stale because it is outside this specialist write scope; release verification must rebuild it from the verified source changes.
followUps: Integration owner should rebuild generated output, run the canonical repository gate, and repeat independent release review on the exact integrated candidate.
